title: Quran, Sura 82: Al-Infitar
description: Sura 82 (Al-Infitar: The Cleaving) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 82 (Al-Infitar: The Cleaving) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: When the sky breaks apart, and when the stars fall, scattering, and when the seas are erupted, and when the contents of graves are scattered.
